best_review_details.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
We would highly recommend Damos Decking & Fencing. We are absolutely over the moon with the transformation of the area we had to work with. Damo and his team executed the plan to perfection, delivering everything within the agreed timescale and at a very competitive price.

The whole team worked incredibly hard from start to finish and clearly take real pride in the quality of their work. Th
best_review_details.author: Mr.

best_review_details.text: Can highly recommend Damo’s Decking and Fencing.  Damo has just completed the most perfect decking.  It wasn’t easy - levels on the house were out - rock under the lawn (which explains all the moss!) and a drain inspection chamber higher than I wanted the finished decking.  Not a problem for Damo - he sorted it all out - constructed the decking to a high standard (not a nail in sight - all screwed
best_review_details.author: Gail

best_review_details.text: Really pleased with the fence Damo installed. He pays attention to detail, notices things I didn’t see such as ensuring it goes in a straight line, and it’s built to be as strong as can be. Really neat work, particularly given my driveway is sloped and also has a retaining wall beneath the fence. I found him personable and trustworthy.
best_review_details.author: Lisa
